setup_steps: 1. Create coupon QA-MAXED with max_uses_total=1; 2. Login as USER_EMAIL; 3. Add product to cart; 4. Apply QA-MAXED; 5. Complete checkout or remove coupon after discount applied
precondition_state: Total use count = 1 = Maximum use number
expected_behavior: Cart must reject with error on second attempt by any user
cleanup: Delete coupon and recreate with count=0 if reset needed

setup_steps: 1. Create coupon QA-PERCUST with max_uses_per_customer=1; 2. Login as USER_EMAIL; 3. Add product to cart; 4. Apply QA-PERCUST successfully once
expected_behavior: Same user second attempt rejected; different user can still use it
cleanup: Delete coupon and recreate if reset needed

setup_steps: 1. Create coupon QA-CPNEXPIRED with expiration_date=yesterday; 2. Promotion P15 remains active with no end date
precondition_state: Coupon expiry in past while promotion still active
expected_behavior: Cart must reject even though promotion itself is not expired
cleanup: No cleanup needed — coupon stays expired
test_purpose: Validates coupon-level expiry independent of promotion

setup_steps: 1. Create promotion P09 with is_active=false; 2. Coupon EXPIRED-TEST exists on P09
precondition_state: Promotion inactive or end date in past
expected_behavior: Storefront coupons page must not show it; cart must reject code
cleanup: Toggle is_active=true to restore if needed

setup_steps: 1. Open Admin > any promotion > Coupons tab; 2. Click Add; 3. Type 'INVALID CODE!' in Code field
precondition_state: No precondition — test is about admin validation
expected_behavior: Admin must show validation error or prevent save
test_purpose: Validates alphanumeric-only constraint on coupon codes

setup_steps: 1. Set P16 (or P01) exclusivity to 'Globally exclusive'; 2. Add product to cart; 3. Apply QA10OFF; 4. Attempt to also apply SUPER
precondition_state: QA10OFF applied with globally exclusive flag
expected_behavior: Second coupon SUPER must be rejected; only exclusive coupon remains
cleanup: Restore P01 exclusivity to 'Valid with other offers'

scenario: Automatic promotion hidden from coupons page
setup_steps: 1. Verify P10 (or 'Snack as a gift') has is_public=true and zero coupon codes; 2. Navigate to /account/coupons
precondition_state: Promotion exists with 0 coupons and is_public=true
expected_behavior: Must NOT appear on storefront coupons page — only coupon-bearing promotions shown
test_purpose: Validates automatic promotions excluded from coupons list

setup_steps: 1. P01 assigned to B2B-store only; 2. Second store exists without P01 assignment; 3. Check coupons page on each store
expected_behavior: P01 visible on B2B-store coupons page; absent on unassigned store
cleanup: No cleanup needed unless store assignment changed
